# Corentin Mors

> Co-founder and CTO of Subnoto, building confidential e-signature for enterprises using cloud trusted execution environments. Over seven years of experience in software development, passkeys, secure authentication, and confidential computing. Former Senior Software Engineer at Dashlane.

## About

- [Profile](https://me.pixelswap.fr/): Professional profile — experience, talks, publications, and background
- [Full profile (plain text)](https://me.pixelswap.fr/llms-full.txt): Complete structured summary for AI systems

## Work

- [Subnoto](https://subnoto.com): Confidential e-signature platform (Co-founder & CTO, since January 2025)
- [Dashlane](https://www.dashlane.com/): Senior Software Engineer (2022–2024), patents on cloud secure enclaves and zero-knowledge IAM

## Writing & Projects

- [Dev blog](https://dev.pixelswap.fr/): Technical writing and development projects

## Expertise

Enterprise security, confidential computing, passkeys, secure authentication, e-signature, trusted execution environments, software infrastructure, DevOps, cybersecurity, web development
